text.title: Meta Audience Targeting (Granular) Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real meta-audience-targeting engagements. Each pairs a symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Audience '$1M ARR Engineer Manager Lean Dev' = 8k people; CPM 4x bench.
Behavioral filter 'page visited last 7 days' delivers 60% iOS Other; CPA opaque.
Niche product on Advantage+ Audience; CPM matched; CPA 3x.
antipattern.fix: Disable Advantage+; revert to tier strategy with manual targeting.
